mapper.select:
/*AcenRcpMgmtMapper.getAcenHist*/
SELECT ACEN.RES_NO AS resNo /*예약번호*/ , TO_CHAR(ACEN.RSLT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS rsltDttm /*연동일시*/ , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'AcenEvntType' AND DTL_CD = ACEN.EVNT_TYPE) AS evntTypeNm /*시나리오(상세)*/ , DECODE(ACEN.CHNL_CD,'01','요청','응답') AS chnlCdNm /*연동유형*/ , ACEN.CHNL_CD AS chnlCd , ACEN.RSLT_CD AS rsltCd , ACEN.RSLT_MSG AS rsltMsg , ACEN.PROC_CD AS procCd , ACEN.ERR_CD AS errCd , ACEN.ERR_MSG AS errMsg FROM NMCP_ACEN_HIST@DL_MCP ACEN WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} ORDER BY SEQ DESC

/*AcenRcpMgmtMapper.getAcenFailHist*/
SELECT B.CSTMR_NAME AS CSTMR_NM /*고객명*/ , A.RES_NO /*예약번호*/ , TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REGST_DTTM /*실패일시*/ , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'AcenEvntType' AND DTL_CD = A.EVNT_TYPE) AS EVNT_TYPE_NM /*실패시나리오*/ , DECODE(A.REQ_STATUS, 'Y', '요청','미요청') AS REQ_STATUS_NM /*요청여부*/ , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'AcenErrCd' AND DTL_CD = A.FAIL_RMK) AS ACEN_FAIL_RMK /*실패사유*/ FROM NMCP_ACEN_FAIL_HIST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} ORDER BY SEQ DESC

/*AcenRcpMgmtMapper.getAcenRetryHist*/
SELECT RES_NO /*예약번호*/ , TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REGST_DTTM /*재실행일시*/ , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'AcenEvntType' AND DTL_CD = EVNT_TYPE) AS EVNT_TYPE_NM /*재실행시나리오*/ , DECODE(REGST_ID, 'ACEN', REGST_ID, FN_GET_USRNM(REGST_ID)) AS REGST_NM /*요청자*/ FROM NMCP_ACEN_RTY_HIST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} ORDER BY SEQ DESC

/*AcenRcpMgmtMapper.getAcenProcStatus*/ SELECT A.EVNT_GRP_CD , A.EVNT_TYPE , A.END_STATUS , A.SUCC_YN , A.OPEN_YN , B.PSTATE , B.REQUEST_STATE_CODE , B.REQ_USIM_SN , C.DLVRY_TYPE FROM NMCP_ACEN_REQ@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP B , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP C WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /*AcenRcpMgmtMapper.insertAcenRtyHist*/ INSERT INTO NMCP_ACEN_RTY_HIST@DL_MCP( REQUEST_KEY , SEQ , RES_NO , EVNT_GRP_CD , EVNT_TYPE , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY , NVL((SELECT MAX(SEQ) + 1 FROM NMCP_ACEN_RTY_HIST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY= #{requestKey}), 1) , RES_NO , EVNT_GRP_CD , #{rtyEvntType} , #{sessionUserId} , SYSDATE FROM NMCP_ACEN_REQ@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
